CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ANGELA LOGAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-08-2008 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARK STURM MBA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOGAN DESIGN & CONSTRUCTION, INC. ANGELEA LOGAN SE RVICE AGT $431.25 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $506.25, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGELA LOGAN NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST " DENIED". OTHER: THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND GOOD CAUSE WAS NOT SHOWN FOR THE LATE REQUEST.
